segments.speaker: 讲话人4/5
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I heard you got an internship at an advertising agency in town for the summer. That's so exciting. I know I start the 1​st week of June. I actually just found out. I also got offered an internship at an agency in Detroit. The company has a good reputation, but I'd have to move to another city, find an apartment. I see. Well, I'm glad one of us is having luck with internships. You still haven't heard back from the architecture firm. Now considering the semester's over in a couple weeks, I think I should make other plans.
